_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.465), DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.480). Shared vocabulary: [conducting, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, bit, level] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, architecture, assessments, coordination, data, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.922, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Skill in conducting bit-level analysis." and "Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.470 ≈ STS 0.480 (gap 0.010). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [conducting, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [conducting, skill]. DCWF-only: [analysis, bit, level]. WIDAI-only: [ai, architecture, assessments, coordination, data, identification].
